diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Junior Risk Capital Rental Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.6.2.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](56655922-1c77-40f7-83f4-3b9af9dc0c59), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.6.2.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](c054e1a5-5ea9-4f95-a469-d357bc30cd41).
